title: Bushy Grass Blocks
description: A small pack that makes the grass on grass blocks extrude from the sides.
body:
# Discord: Visit my discord server for work in progress textures, and give feedback! Changelogs are posted in there for all previous updates + updates that are actively in progress!
# Bushy grass block is real! People really enjoyed the grass block model I made for [Through Tiki's Eyes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/through-tikis-eyes) resource pack, so here I made a pack with vanilla grass block having extruding grass from the sides. # Dependencies (Optional): **Sodium**: fixes lighting bug with custom models while also providing better fps
